zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Neville於1363年9月15日出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比 卡素時，他的父親John Neville26歲，母親Maud de Percy29歲。他於1382年與Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland在英國斯塔福爾斯塔福德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他於1415年登記服兵役。他在英國英格蘭被列為warden of carlisle and the west march。他去世於1425年10月21日在他的家鄉享年62歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Neville于1363年9月15日出生在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比 卡素时，他的父亲John Neville26岁，母亲Maud de Percy29岁。他于1382年与Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland在英国斯塔福爾斯塔福德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他于1415年登记服兵役。他在英国英格兰被列为warden of carlisle and the west march。他去世于1425年10月21日在他的家乡享年62岁，埋葬在英国英格兰達勒姆斯泰德洛普。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Neville was born on 15 September 1363, in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Neville, was 26 and his mother, Maud de Percy, was 29. He married Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland in 1382, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He registered for military service in 1415. His occupation is listed as warden of carlisle and the west march in England, United Kingdom. He died on 21 October 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 62, and was buried in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Neville est né le 15 septembre 1363, à Raby Castle, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Neville, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Maud de Percy, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland en 1382, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1415. Sa profession de son indiquée est warden of carlisle and the west march à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 21 octobre 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Neville am 15. September 1363 in Raby Castle, Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Neville 26 und seine Mutter Maud de Percy 29. Er hat 1382 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er hat sich 1415 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. sein Beruf ist als warden of carlisle and the west march in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 21. Oktober 1425 im Alter von 62 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Staindrop, Durham, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville è nato il il 15 settembre 1363 nel Raby Castle, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Neville, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Maud de Percy, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland nel 1382, nel Stafford, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1415. La sua occupazione è indicata come warden of carlisle and the west march nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 21 ottobre 1425, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Staindrop, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Raby-With-Keverstone, Durham: イギリスイギリスダルハムラビー ウィス ケバーストーン
ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Nevilleが1363年9月15日にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビー カストルで生まれた時，父John Nevilleは26歳，母Maud de Percyは29歳であった。1382年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードでMargaret Stafford Countess of Westmorelandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年に兵役登録をした。イギリスイギリスでの職業はwarden of carlisle and the west marchと記録されている。彼は1425年10月21日に故郷で62歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスダルハムスティインドロップにて埋葬された。

ko.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 앤조우
ko.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.Raby-With-Keverstone, Durham: 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 위스 케버스톤
ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Neville(이)가 1363년 9월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비 카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Neville(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud de Percy(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1382년 영국 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 warden of carlisle and the west march이었다. 그는 1425년 10월 21일 그의 고향에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스테인드럽에 묻혔다.

pt.15 September 1363–21 October 1425: 15 de setembro de 1363–21 de outubro de 1425
pt.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: Anjou, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França
pt.Raby Castle, Raby-With-Keverstone, Durha: Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Raby Castle, Durham, England: Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Raby-With-Keverstone, Durham: Raby with Keverstone, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville nasceu em 15 de setembro de 1363, em Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Neville, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Maud de Percy, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland em 1382, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1415. Sua profissão aparece como warden of carlisle and the west march em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 21 de outubro de 1425, em sua cidade natal, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: анджоу, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Newcastle Upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Raby-With-Keverstone, Durham: раби вит кивирстоун, дурам, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Neville родился 15 сентября 1363 г. в местности раби кастл, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Neville было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud de Percy, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland в 1382 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. В 1415 году он поступил на военную службу. Работал по профессии warden of carlisle and the west march в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 21 октября 1425 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, Великобритания.

es.15 September 1363–21 October 1425: 15 de septiembre de 1363–21 de octubre de 1425
es.Château de Beaufort, Anjou, Maine-et-Loi: Anjou, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Neville nació el 15 de septiembre de 1363, en Raby Castle, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Neville, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Maud de Percy, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Margaret Stafford Countess of Westmoreland en 1382, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1415. Su ocupación registrada era warden of carlisle and the west march en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 21 de octubre de 1425, en su pueblo, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
